← AEAOS
Registry & Governance
v2.0.0

Registry & Governance

PE-0 · P5 Gate · DMS §1 / §7 / §8
Registry-first, fail-closed, multi-tenant isolation and environment-gated promotion. The platform grows safely because every object is governed before it runs.

// Design Principles (P1–P5)

The five object-level iron laws of the AEAOS Domain Model (DMS §1). They are enforced in code, not as documentation.

// P5 Environment Promotion Gates

A Solution is promoted across environments: dev → test → staging → prod. Each promotion MUST pass the full P5 gate set, fail-closed (registry/promotion.py).

// Tenant / Workspace Isolation

Multi-tenant isolation is mandatory (P4). Tenant → Workspace → Application → Capability form the successive containment boundaries. Environments default to dev+test enabled; staging+prod are gated and must be promoted (registry/workspace-store.yaml).

// Solution Signing & Verification

Every Solution carries a publisher signature (ed25519-jws). Install verifies the signature and runs the six-class Ecosystem validation before any object is registered.

Publisher signs
ed25519-jws
→
Install fetches
registry/solution.yaml
→
Verify signature
+ 6-class checks
→
Register objects
fail-closed

Sample signatures from the Solution Registry: amaris-ai-consultant · ed25519-jws:placeholder ac-sales-coach-solution · ed25519-jws:placeholder

AEAOS v2.0.0 — Enterprise AI Agent Operating System
Understand. Decide. Execute. Evolve.
